query: Silver Star Loppet cross country ski race Silver Star Mountain Resort

videos.title: Larch Hills Nordics - Silver Star Camp 2013
videos.description: Larch Hills Nordic Jr Racing Team 10-11 year olds at ski camp ski and dance to Katy Perry "Roar" (Album:  Prism, 2013, Capitol Records).  This activity and organization are not for profit and volunteer led and the purpose of this video is to inspire other kids to try cross country skiing.

videos.title: Johannes Hoesflot Klaebo books spot in sprint classic final | Winter Olympics 2026 | NBC Sports
videos.description:
Norwegian cross-country skiing legend Johannes Hoesflot Klaebo cruises to first place in the second semifinal of the men's sprint classic. American JC Schoonmaker finished in fourth, missing out on the final. #NBCSports #WinterOlympics #Skiing

videos.title: GOLD for McKeever in Para-Nordic | March 10 | Team Canada | Sochi 2014 Paralympic Winter Games
videos.transcript:
[Music]
what a day for Canadian fans attending
the Nordic skiing at the 2014 Sochi par
Olympics Monday Not only was it a
beautiful day in the caucuses there was
also a Canadian skiing Legend at the
front of the pack all day long the men's
20 km classic for the visually impaired
Brian mckever from Canmore was helped
through the first half of the race by
guide Eric Carlton also from Canmore
then at the 10K mark move you don't
often see in the 20K a guide change as
Graham nishikawa from White Horse moved
onto the course the change over went
according to plan with mckever and
nishikawa building on their lead in
challenging soft snow conditions Russian
stanislav chakalov was the only racer
within Striking Distance through the
final 4 kilometers but mver and
nishikawa built their lead from 30
seconds to more than a minute and in
front of thousands of cheering fans
drove it home
[Applause]
ah it feels incredible and it feels
incredible that we did it with such a
strong team effort uh these guys here
Eric and Graham just absolutely nailed
it today as guides uh you know it's so
hard to stay out front the whole time
that we we use two today uh Eric said
just an incredible Pace to start with
did everything I asked and then uh in
the second half Grand brought it home
and uh and we managed to to just
maintain a good Tempo and and it was it
was all on these guys Brian's a world
class athlete and he's really fast and
Eric and I are in tough It's hard for us
to stay in front so yeah we definitely
had to split the workload and we were
working hard out there to get them
around the course but feels awesome that
we got the job done

videos.title: Sovereign to SilverStar Loppet 2023
videos.description:
The S2S Loppet is a fantastic 2 day even that has a 20km and 42km (Free and Classic) style the first weekend of April.  Amazing XC ski trails with rolling hills and twisty turns.

A very well organized and executed event with amazing energy and volunteers. To learn more about the event please visit https://www.sovereign2silverstar.com/home

videos.title: The American Birkebeiner cross-country ski race
videos.description:
Since it was first held 50 years ago, the American Birkebeiner, a trek of more than 30 miles through the Northwoods of Wisconsin, modeled after a fabled bit of Norwegian history, has become the largest cross-country ski race in the U.S. Correspondent Conor Knighton reports on how enthusiasm for the festival of events surrounding the race (dubbed "Birke fever") has snowballed.
#Birkebeiner #crosscountryski 

"CBS Sunday Morning" features stories on the arts, music, nature, entertainment, sports, history, science and Americana, and highlights unique human accomplishments and achievements. Check local listings for CBS Sunday Morning broadcast times.

videos.transcript:
it's part ski Marathon part Norwegian
History part Street Festival Connor
Knighton takes us to the starting line
of a race like none other
s
[Music]
each winter thousands of cross-country
skiers from all across the world travel
to the North Woods of Wisconsin to
travel more than 30 miles between the
towns of cable and Hayward
the American birkabiner is the largest
cross-country ski race in the country
and the enthusiasm here is contagious we
all got the Berkey fever and it's just
the excitement that builds about not
only the race but the whole event of
Berkey week the official burkabiner race
Berkey for short could fly by in a
couple of hours for the most elite
skiers the leading up to the main event
there are days of activities there are
shorter races for children
foreign
dog lovers ski with their pets teams of
six compete in giant ski races it's kind
of like Comic-Con for athletes is how
I'm looking at it Jackie and Dan daroma
are Avid skiers Jackie has skied the
Berkey four times Dan 17 but for this
year's race they wanted to do things a
little differently these other Racers
are going to be in spandex Gore-Tex you
know what are you gonna be wearing full
on fur
Jackie Dan and Dan's Father Jim were
selected to be mascots of sorts skiing
the entire course on wooden skis dressed
as Norwegian folk Heroes all while
carrying a baby doll it's a tradition
with roots and a far older history
as portrayed in the film The Last King
in the early 13th century Norway was in
the middle of a civil war after King
hokan III died members of the birkaviner
faction skied his son the heir to the
throne through the woods to safety
each year in Wisconsin three skiers
reenact the rescue I think the the fact
that there is this real story about an
event that now you're recreating it I
think that's pretty darn cool and pretty
special and I think it resonates with a
lot of people Ben pop is the executive
director of the American burkabiner
which is modeled after a Norwegian race
there every competitor skis with a baby
weight backpack to honor the Warriors
journey of course you may be asking
yourself why is this crazy Norwegian
history have anything to do with Hayward
Wisconsin in the middle of Northwestern
Wisconsin nowhere it all came down to
one man Tony wise
Tony wise was born in Hayward and was a
born marketer after serving in World War
II he decided to bring the competitive
skiing he observed in Europe back home
to Wisconsin a place where a
Scandinavian ancestry is common as a way
to encourage tourism his first Berkey
race held 50 years ago had just 35
participants most of whom had never
cross-country skied before I swore up
and down after that first I would never
do anything so foolish again but
today at age 75
Ernie St Germain is the only competitor
who's participated in every single race
but there are more than 2 000 athletes
who have appeared in 20 or more contests
which can turn into grueling all-day
endeavors
the Berkey attracts skiers of varying
ages and ability levels
you're really gonna discover who you are
it's one of the toughest Marathon
courses in the world so let yourself
kind of Glide a little there you go good
that challenge is what attracts Elite
skiers like Olympian Caitlyn Gregg who's
won the women's race a record setting
five times the Berkey course is unlike
any other ski course that we get to race
not only here in the United States but
also in around the world and I think
that it's terrain is so unique and so
challenging that people just myself
included love that aspect of it
the race itself has faced challenges
posed by warmer Winters in recent
decades it's been canceled twice due to
lack of snow it's really important that
we look at climate change and weather
because if we don't have it well it's a
big loss the event provides a major
boost for the local economy this town of
fewer than 3 000 residents hosts close
to 40 000 Spectators on race day
hayward's Main Street overflows with
cheering fans caught up in Berkey fever
for which the only prescription is more
cowbell
the church bells signal the arrival of
the first finisher David Norris won this
year's men's race with a commanding lead
Caitlyn Gregg came in third in the
women's division
the biggest cheers of the day were
reserved for the dromas nearly 7
after leaving the starting line they
skied onto Main Street and swapped out
the baby doll for an actual baby
their daughter Clara played the part of
Prince Hogan for the final few blocks
the burkabiners saved the day
until
do it all again next year
I'll be ready to go

videos.title: Gatineau Loppet 2015
videos.description: Experience the excitement of Canada's World Loppet Cross-country Ski Race. This was my 25 and 26 time experiencing this challenging 2 day marathon on skis. It take place in February in the scenic Gatineau Hills just north of Canada's capital Ottawa.--Saul
